title: The Sleep Solution: Why Your Sleep Is Broken and How to Fix It
rationale: The Sleep Solution fills an essential gap in the sleep-book landscape: where Why We Sleep provides laboratory science, Winter provides clinical practice. Written by a board-certified neurologist and sleep medicine specialist with 20+ years of patient encounters, this book reframes insomnia as a conditioned behavioral and cognitive problem rather than a sleep-production failure. It popularized CBT-I for a general audience and established the clinically grounded counterpoint to the alarmist narrative of contemporary sleep literature. Its unique contribution is the sleepiness-vs-fatigue distinction, the myth-busting opening, and a practical self-directed CBT-I program that can be implemented without a therapist.
